transforms.name: vite:vue
vite:css
transforms.result: .casino-card{position:relative}.casino-card .casino-card-image{border:0;height:525px;-o-object-fit:cover;object-fit:cover;position:relative;vertical-align:middle;width:100%}@media only screen and (min-width:1068px){.casino-card .casino-card-image{height:575px}}@media only screen and (max-width:1067px){.casino-card .casino-card-image{height:725px}}.casino-card .casino-card-text-top{color:#fdfdfd;left:10px;padding:0 30px;position:absolute;top:20px}.casino-card .casino-card-text-top img{height:55px}.casino-card .casino-card-text{bottom:20px;color:#fdfdfd;left:10px;padding:0 30px;position:absolute}.casino-card .casino-card-text h2{animation:fadeInDown .4s;font-size:30px;font-weight:700;line-height:1.1;white-space:pre}.casino-card .casino-card-text p{animation:fadeInUp .4s;font-size:18px;text-shadow:1px 1px #000}.card-swiper{background-position:50%;background-repeat:no-repeat;background-size:cover;border-radius:3px;box-shadow:rgba(0,0,0,.5);overflow:hidden}.card-swiper a{display:block}.card-swiper span{top:20px;width:180px!important}.card-swiper h2,.card-swiper span{left:10px;padding:0 30px;position:absolute}.card-swiper h2{bottom:20px;color:#fff;font-size:30px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase}@keyframes fadeInDown{0%{opacity:0;transform:translate3d(0,-80%,0)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateZ(0)}}@keyframes fadeInUp{0%{opacity:0;transform:translate3d(0,20%,0)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateZ(0)}}
